strategy: Storm boss (7790). Hit with Myth (+35%); avoid Storm (35% resist).
Keep every spell at 3 pips or fewer. Casting anything using more than 3 pips makes him interrupt with a Fire Power Nova on the team.
Stack cheap blades and traps, then hit with a low-pip (3 or under) Myth spell you have buffed up. Pet-given item cards do not trigger the nova, so a low-pip item hit is safe too.
cheatNotes: Any spell that uses more than 3 pips triggers a Fire Power Nova on the team. Keep your casts at 3 pips or under and rely on blades and traps to power a small hit.
Pet-given item cards do not trigger the Power Nova, so a low-pip item attack is a safe option.
